'''Drever Corporation''' was a weapons manufacturing corporation in the [[Parmic sector/Legends|Parmic sector]].

==History==
Around the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Drever Corporation created the [["Phoenix II" plasma disruptor]] for special forces as a tool to break through sealed doors. However, these soldiers saw its effectiveness as a weapon as well and began using its devastating electrical charges against [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Because of this, Drever produced the [["DN bolt caster" plasma disruptor]], which saw use by many [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone pilots]] during the Clone Wars.

During the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], the corporation was led by [[Jenson Drever II]].<ref name="GG9" /> They produced the [[Phoenix Plasma Punch]], which was a boarding tool employed by [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]].<ref name="RP" />

{{Company-stub}}
